body.value: 鹿児島藩 — 書ナラス (かきならず) = 「記載なし／書面に出さない」

Kagoshima domain — with the literal annotation 書ナラス ('not written / not specified'). On THIS page Satsuma discloses essentially nothing for HI Table 8 (military). The numeric values appearing to the RIGHT of this marker (read first in R→L Japanese order) belong to the PRECEDING domain whose entry continues onto this page from the prior PDF page. MASTER currently mis-attributes those values to Satsuma; flagged for separate correction.
